title: P8 live-value record: P5 commit held by visible queue pressure
body: Owner called this live trace useful; preserving it as P8 design input. During the P5 strict comms parser slice, the active collaboration state made otherwise invisible blockers actionable: Dim had a staged WS1.6 note plus git:index/head claim/queue intent in pre_commit; Fiery was waiting on Verdant's pnpm-lock release; Luminous took over coordination from Ferny and routed a read-only Umbral gate-check before staging; Twigged held a broad consolidation claim over memory/state surfaces. The useful UI signal is not polish: humans need to see active collaborators, recent changes, staged/queued work, queue pressure, downstream dependency pressure, and directed-thread pressure live before touching the index.
